mapper.sql: select t.id, t.task_no, t.task_name, t.workpiece_name, t.customer_dept_id, d.dept_name as customer_dept_name, t.study_instance_uid, t.orthanc_study_id, t.status, t.is_public_sample, t.remark, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.del_flag from ndt_inspection_task t left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = t.customer_dept_id
mapper.select:
t.del_flag = '0' and t.task_no like concat('%', #{taskNo}, '%') and t.task_name like concat('%', #{taskName}, '%') and t.workpiece_name like concat('%', #{workpieceName}, '%') and t.customer_dept_id = #{customerDeptId} and t.study_instance_uid like concat('%', #{studyInstanceUid}, '%') and t.status = #{status}
and exists ( select 1 from ndt_task_user tu where tu.task_id = t.id and tu.user_id = #{params.scopeUserId} and tu.can_view = '1' )
and t.customer_dept_id = #{params.scopeDeptId} and 1 = 0
order by t.create_time desc, t.id desc

t.del_flag = '0' and t.is_public_sample = '1' and t.task_name like concat('%', #{taskName}, '%')
order by t.create_time desc, t.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_inspection_task (task_no, task_name, workpiece_name, customer_dept_id, study_instance_uid, orthanc_study_id, status, is_public_sample, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{taskNo}, #{taskName}, #{workpieceName}, #{customerDeptId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{orthancStudyId}, #{status}, #{isPublicSample}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update ndt_inspection_task set task_name = #{taskName}, workpiece_name = #{workpieceName}, customer_dept_id = #{customerDeptId}, study_instance_uid = #{studyInstanceUid}, orthanc_study_id = #{orthancStudyId}, status = #{status}, is_public_sample = #{isPublicSample}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}

update ndt_inspection_task set study_instance_uid = #{studyInstanceUid}, orthanc_study_id = #{orthancStudyId}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update ndt_inspection_task set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
